title: Magic Teleportation Coin Mod
description: Explore Minecraft like never before with the Teleportation Magic Coin, instantly teleporting you to random locations within 25,000 blocks. A thrilling adventure with every click.
body:
# 📑 Description

The Teleportation Magic Coin mod introduces a unique item to your Minecraft world - a magical coin that harnesses the power of teleportation. With a simple right-click, players can embark on a journey to random coordinates within a vast 25,000 block radius, offering endless possibilities for exploration and discovery.

This mod is perfect for adventurers seeking new landscapes and the thrill of the unknown. Whether you're looking to escape danger, find new resources, or just enjoy a spontaneous adventure, the Teleportation Magic Coin provides a quick and magical means to travel across your Minecraft universe.

**Remember to install the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

# ⚙️ Recipes
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dab0ce87746730c329bf7e8c0b3b2d6ddc3759d2.png)
